hero.slide1_title: Dare to Check Your End-of-Month Balance?
hero.slide1_desc: Ready to get roasted by AI for overspending? Track your expenses now and prove to the system that you can save.
hero.slide2_title: Focus on Hustling, Let AI Do the Math.
hero.slide2_desc: Monitor your cashflow while chilling. PyDuiten helps you track every penny going in and out through a super clean dashboard.
hero.slide3_title: What Are You Waiting For? Give It a Try!
hero.slide3_desc: Thousands of Gen Z are getting financially literate. Don't be the only one late to the party. Achieve your financial freedom now!

features.heading: Why Switch to Us?
features.subheading: Not just another money tracker. We bring AI technology to help you gain financial self-awareness.
features.feat1_desc: Get brutally roasted or sweetly praised by Gemini AI based on your monthly spending habits.
features.feat2_desc: Monitor your cashflow with data visualizations that are clean, easy to read, and headache-free.
features.feat3_desc: Lightning fast access. Install it directly to your phone without downloading tens of MBs from the App Store.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.desc: No need to overthink or learn accounting. Let the system do the work for you.
howItWorks.step1_desc: Enter your incoming salary or outgoing expenses. Takes only 5 seconds.
howItWorks.step2_desc: The system automatically calculates your balance and sends the data to the AI's brain.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Read the AI's feedback to boost your motivation to save (or stop overspending).

cta.heading: Ready to Take Control?
cta.desc: Leave old habits behind. Start tracking your finances now with the help of AI. Free, secure, and ad-free.

auth.login_subtitle: Enter your credentials to see how broke you are this month.
auth.right_panel_desc: Join thousands of other Gen Zs who have repented from their spending habits thanks to AI.
auth.err_empty: Email and password are required, bro!
auth.err_email_empty: Fill in your email first so we know whose account to reset!

welcome.ready: System ready, let's track your cash

register.title: Join PyDuiten Now!
register.subtitle: One step closer to financial peace. Register your account below.
register.terms_text_1: By creating an account, you agree to our
register.err_all_fields: Please fill in all fields, bro!
register.err_password_short: Password must be at least 6 characters, dude!
register.success_desc: Your account is active and ready for tracking. Let's log in now, bro!

legal.privacy_sec1_desc: PyDuiten only stores data you provide: Name, Email, and your transaction logs to be analyzed by AI.
legal.privacy_sec2_desc: Our Gemini AI analysis is anonymous, so rest assured your financial secrets are safe.
legal.terms_sec1_desc: You agree to use PyDuiten wisely.
legal.terms_sec2_desc: We help you analyze, but the decision to buy expensive coffee every day is still up to you!

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal details and profile picture here.
profile.success_desc: Your profile data has been safely saved to the database.
profile.err_required: Username, Email, and Phone Number are required, dude!
profile.err_failed: Failed to save profile, please try again later, bro.

transaction.title: Transaction Management
transaction.subtitle: Log all your cashflow in PyDuiten.
transaction.delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this data? Once deleted, it will be permanently lost from the server and cannot be recovered, bro.
transaction.history_empty: No transactions yet. Let's start logging!
transaction.history_filter_empty: No transactions found in this category.

ai_advisor.title: Gemini AI Advisor
ai_advisor.thinking: Thinking of the right words for you...
ai_advisor.rate_limit: Whoa dude, you're asking too fast, take a breath for a minute!
ai_advisor.error: Whoops, the AI is dizzy thinking about your money. Try refreshing...

dashboard.title: Financial Summary
dashboard.subtitle: Keep tracking your money so you don't go broke.
dashboard.insight_default: Your finances are still safe and reasonable. Don't forget to allocate for emergency funds/investments!
dashboard.insight_empty: No transactions in this period yet, bro. Start tracking your finances!
dashboard.insight_negative: Whoa, your spending is higher than your income in this period. Slap the brakes on it so you don't go broke!
dashboard.insight_positive: Awesome! Your finances are super solid. Keep up the saving/investing habit in any form.
dashboard.insight_boros: Btw, this month your {{category}} category is {{percentage}}% more expensive than last month. Re-evaluate your spending on that!
dashboard.pdf_empty: No transactions in this period yet, bro. Let's start tracking your finances!
dashboard.pdf_negative: Whoa, your spending is higher than your income in this period. Reduce your spending so you don't go broke!
dashboard.pdf_positive: Awesome! Your finances are super healthy. Keep up the smart spending and save regularly.
dashboard.pdf_default: Your finances are still safe and reasonable. Don't forget to allocate for emergency funds!
dashboard.chart_subtitle: Your money movement over the last few days
dashboard.chart_empty: No data available to generate charts.

dashboard_card.status_danger: Damn! You're spending way too much
dashboard_card.status_warning: Don't overdo it, be careful bro
dashboard_card.projection_desc_1: Based on your spending over the last {{day}} days, your predicted end-of-month balance is
dashboard_card.projection_desc_2: Whoa, hit the brakes on your spending, bro!

dashboard_recent.title: Recent Activity
dashboard_recent.empty:
No transactions this month.
Let's start logging!

dashboard_note.title: PyDuiten System Notes
dashboard_note.subtitle: Income & Expense Analysis
dashboard_note.empty: No transactions in this period yet, bro.
dashboard_note.inc_good: Awesome, your income successfully covers your expenses!
dashboard_note.inc_bad: Unfortunately, this income isn't enough to cover your excessive spending this month.
dashboard_note.inc_top: The most helpful income came from {{category}} amounting to {{amount}}. {{apresiasi}}
dashboard_note.inc_zero: No income recorded yet, bro. Keep hustling!
dashboard_note.exp_normal: Expenses for {{categories}} are still looking normal and within safe limits.
dashboard_note.exp_safe: Awesome! Your spending is still super safe, nothing weird going on.
dashboard_note.exp_danger: DAMN, YOU'RE BROKE! Your money was mostly sucked into {{category}} reaching {{amount}}. Cut it down bro, half your money went just to this!
dashboard_note.exp_deficit: The biggest expense is in {{category}} ({{amount}}). No wonder you're broke this month, hit the brakes boss!
dashboard_note.exp_highest: Your highest expense right now is in {{category}} ({{amount}}). The number makes sense, but keep an eye on it.
dashboard_note.exp_zero: Super cool! No money spent at all. Keep up the shopping fast, bro!

dashboard_pdf.name: Name: {{name}} · Period: {{period}}
dashboard_pdf.footer: Report generated automatically by PyDuiten · Keep tracking your money so you don't go broke!

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password?
forgot_password.subtitle: Chill bro, enter your email and we'll send the instructions.
forgot_password.err_fallback: Failed to send email, check your connection or SMTP config bro.

reset_password.title: New Password
reset_password.subtitle: Enter a hard-to-guess new password to keep your account safe, bro.
reset_password.err_length: Password must be at least 6 characters, dude!
reset_password.err_fallback: Oops, failed to reset password. Try again later, bro.
reset_password.success_desc: Awesome! Now you can login with your new password. Hang tight, redirecting...
reset_password.note_once: This link is only valid for one-time use, bro.

layout.logout_title: Sure You Want to Log Out?
layout.logout_msg: Your session will end, bro. You'll need to enter your email and password again to access the app.

wishlist.title: Dream Wishlist
wishlist.subtitle: Track your dream goals. Stop buying iced coffee so you can afford it!
wishlist.placeholder_name: E.g., Buy PS5, Trip to Bali...
wishlist.empty: You don't have any goals yet, bro. Add some!
